message:
feat: Add full SQL feature parity to DataFrame API

- Add JOIN support: join(), innerJoin(), leftJoin(), rightJoin(), crossJoin()
- Add window functions: window(), rowNumber(), rank(), denseRank(), lag(), lead()
- Add PIVOT transformation: pivot()
- Add set operations: unionAll(), union_(), intersect(), except()
- Add DISTINCT support: distinct()
- Add convenience methods: alias(), head(), tail(), sample()

DataFrame now covers all SQL features:
- SELECT, WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY, LIMIT, OFFSET (existing)
- JOIN (inner, left, right, full, cross) - NEW
- Window functions (row_number, rank, dense_rank, lag, lead) - NEW
- PIVOT - NEW
- UNION, INTERSECT, EXCEPT - NEW
- WITH RECURSIVE - handled by SQL layer
